title: cereus setosus
intro: Cereus setosus, also known as the hairy cereus or prickly pear cactus, is a species of cactus native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cereus setosus include its ability to soothe wounds, reduce pain and inflammation, and support digestive health. Herbal preparations of Cereus setosus include teas, infusions, and salves, which can be made from the plant's stems and flowers, and are often used to treat minor injuries and skin irritations.
